arts.ttl: Barcelona star leading Arsenal’s Bukayo Saka as best key passer in Europe
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha leads all players across Europe’s top-7 leagues when it comes to key passes this season. That’s according to statisticians DataMB, who have on Friday provided an insight…

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye La Liga chief as Edu replacement in 2025
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to cast their net wide to source a replacement for former sporting director Edu in 2025. The Premier League giants were left shocked by the Brazilian’s decision to step away from his role at the Emirates Stadium in November with immediate effect. The Gunners opted against a quickfire move to bring in […] The post Arsenal eye La Liga chief as Edu replacement in 2025 appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops clear Arsenal January transfer window hint amid Viktor Gyokeres link
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has downplayed speculation that the title-chasing north Londoners will be making any big moves in the January transfer window from when it opens on New Year's Day. Sporting CP sensation Viktor Gyokeres has been linked with Arsenal - after matching the Gunners' search criteria this summer.

He has helped Everton complete 26.8 long balls each game - the highest number of successful long passes, while no Premier League side is more accurate with their crosses in open play (27%). We have won 18 of our last 22 Premier League games at Emirates Stadium, and are looking to keep three successive clean sheets on home soil for the first time since December 2021.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid want Arsenal target to UNLOCK Mbappe
arts.sum: Real Madrid have joined the race to sign Inter Milan forward Marcus Thuram, according to sensational reports in Spain. Arsenal and Manchester United have both been linked with the 27-year-old for the past few months, while Barcelona, Real Madrid and Liverpool are also interested in signing him next year, according to Spanish outlet Fichajes .

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Gabriel injury, Edu replacement search and January transfers
arts.sum: The club has done very well to make that day feel very special for all the people who got the chance to know him and recognise who he was especially as a person. We are used to playing every three days, the boys trained today and they are really fired up and really looking forward to the game and understanding it is a tough opponent and that we will have to be at our best to beat them.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer could scupper Arsenal chances of landing long-term target
arts.sum: Manchester City's rumoured interest in Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes could scupper Arsenal's chances of landing long-term target Alexander Isak. From an Arsenal perspective, the concern centres around Newcastle potentially settling any future PSR fears with a sale of Guimaraes, which would take away any need to part ways with Isak.

arts.ttl: Is Gabriel fit to start for Arsenal vs Everton? Injury latest and FPL update
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has surprisingly been very open on Gabriel's injury recovery before Everton which will please Fantasy Premier League managers. Despite the fact William Saliba was on target twice in the two games Gabriel missed, he is still five points behind his centre-back partner.
